# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

before_script:
  - export MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_API_TOKEN" https://api.gitlab.com/v4/project/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID | jq -r .title)
  - export MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_API_TOKEN" https://api.gitlab.com/v4/project/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID | jq -r .description)

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - ... # Your build commands here

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - ... # Your deployment commands here
  tags:
    - $MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE

commit_message_template:
  - |
    :title: Deploy $MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
    :description: $MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION

notifications:
  on_success: change
  changes:
    - title: "Deployed: $MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      body: "The deployment for merge request `$MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE` has succeeded."
